trial.input_snapshot:
1. Create skill "API Development":
   - title: "API Development"
   - type: skill
   - scope: global
   - description: "Build REST APIs"
   - skill_level: intermediate
   - triggers: ["api", "rest"]
   - required_tools: []
   
2. Create skill "API Testing":
   - title: "API Testing"
   - type: skill
   - scope: global
   - description: "Test REST APIs"
   - skill_level: intermediate
   - triggers: ["api", "test"]
   - required_tools: []
   
3. Create skill "API Deployment":
   - title: "API Deployment"
   - type: skill
   - scope: global
   - description: "Deploy APIs to production"
   - skill_level: advanced
   - triggers: ["api", "deploy"]
   - required_tools: []
   
4. Link "API Development" -> "API Testing"
5. Link "API Development" -> "API Deployment"

6. Run context_chain from "API Development" with:
   - task: "I need to write tests for my API"
   
7. Verify "API Testing" scores higher or appears earlier than "API Deployment"

Use payload wrapper for all calls.
